text:
Mukatolini's Litographs are a series of lithographs made by the renowned artist Mukatolini. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 10, Chapter 86 

Appearance

The only known lithograph, the third in a series of 50, is a collection of abstract shapes of different colors on a blank background. The author's cursive signature is located below the picture, next to its serial number, and it is nearly as big as the picture. 

Background

Mukatolini signed only the lithographs he really liked. One of them, a piece among a series of 50 limited-edition works, ended up at the Bull Market. 

Plot

Yorknew City arc

Using Gyo to spot "residual aura", Gon and Killua find one of Mukatolini's limited-editions works (3/50 in its series) at the Bull Market. They buy it for 11,000 after outbidding Zepile and then resell it at a pawn shop for 150,000. 

Trivia

The only known lithograph appears to suggest that Mukatolini experimented with geometric abstraction or a similar abstract movement.
